allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\(k,indent=2\)\) for k in d.get\('contributes',{}\).get\('keybindings',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); props=d.get\('contributes',{}\).get\('configuration',{}\).get\('properties',{}\); [print\(k,'=',json.dumps\(v.get\('default'\),indent=0\), '|', v.get\('description',''\)[:80]\) for k,v in props.items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,'=',v\) for k,v in d.items\(\) if 'claude' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if 'terminal' in k.lower\(\) or 'claude' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cmds=d.get\('contributes',{}\).get\('commands',[]\); [print\(c.get\('command'\),'|',c.get\('title',''\)\) for c in cmds]")
